name: copilot

shell_env_vars.name: GH_TELEMETRY
shell_env_vars.disables: Base gh CLI telemetry (does NOT control Copilot CLI)

persistent_files.note: Contains plaintext OAuth tokens (ghu_*). Verify permissions are 0600 — not world-readable.

notes: Copilot CLI has NO documented standalone telemetry toggle. Copilot telemetry is separate from base gh telemetry.
Base gh is controlled by GH_TELEMETRY=false OR 'gh config set telemetry disabled' (both are real; env wins if both set).

caveats.framing: Offline mode for BYOK/local-provider use — NOT a telemetry toggle. Disables web_fetch, /delegate, Code Search and other online-dependent features as a side effect. Only surface to the user if they explicitly asked for the nuclear option.
